whatWasImplemented: supabase/migrations/20260419060000_custom_responses.sql — custom_responses table with FK cascade from sites, trigger_type CHECK ('keyword'|'intent'), triggers text[] NOT EMPTY (cardinality CHECK, not array_length — the latter returns NULL for empty arrays and evaluates a CHECK to permissive), response NOT EMPTY, priority int default 0, is_active boolean default true, created_at + updated_at.
Compound index (site_id, is_active, priority DESC, created_at ASC) matches the hot-path query: /api/chat/session fetches active rules for a site in matching order.

RLS: four owner-scoped policies (SELECT / INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE) all resolving through sites.user_id = auth.uid(). Widget path uses the service-role client and never hits these policies; owners CRUD via the dashboard.

src/__tests__/custom-responses-schema.test.ts — 14 integration tests: insert defaults, trigger_type CHECK, empty triggers CHECK, empty response CHECK, intent trigger_type accepted, owner SELECT, cross-user SELECT blocked, anon SELECT zero, owner INSERT, cross-user INSERT blocked, owner UPDATE, cross-user UPDATE silently no-op, owner DELETE, ON DELETE CASCADE from sites.
whatWasLeftUndone: No assertions fulfilled directly by this feature — it's the foundation for M6F2 matcher + M6F3 UI which fulfill VAL-RESP-001..012.
discoveredIssues: Initial CHECK used `array_length(triggers, 1) > 0` which evaluates to NULL for '{}' and lets empty arrays through. Replaced with `cardinality(triggers) > 0` which returns 0 for empty arrays so the CHECK fails as intended.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 446 passed / 1 skipped / 59 files (+14 new).

manualChecks.action: User A UPDATE of user B's rule

manualChecks.expected: child custom_responses rows vanish via ON DELETE CASCADE
